_comment: Copy to state.json (gitignored) and fill in real values. public_ip is used for SSH from stage 0 to remote stages. wireguard_ip is used as the rpc-server endpoint that llama-bench --rpc connects to; if you do not run WireGuard, put the same address in both fields (e.g. a Tailscale 100.x address or a LAN IP).
